fields.quotation_terms:
1. At Booking Time: 50% advance at the time of booking as Mobilization Charges.
2. Full Payment: 50% (Complete balance payment), one (1) week (07 days) before the event date.
3. Non Payment of Full dues: If full payment is not received one week prior to the function date, the event booking would automatically stand cancelled.
4. In case of corporate customers or government organizations, a work order or purchase order has to be given for booking confirmation. This document should have all basic information like event date, guest count, payable amount and other relevant details.
5. Soft drinks, Juices, Mineral water, Tandoor, Fans, Gas Heater, Generator and Canopies are charged extra.
6. Stage Decoration, Floral arrangements and Decorative Lighting are not part of the package.
7. Changes in menu, timings or number of persons must be informed in writing at least 3 days before the function. Any such change may result in the change of previously agreed rates.
8. In case of changes in the agreed quotation, any complementary item offered may become chargeable.
9. In case of changes in any agreed quotation from multiple events, the other quotations may also get revised.
10. Extra Charges shall be applicable in case of our staff has to stay longer than normal service timings.
11. Refund Policy in case of Cancellation or Postponement. If the booking is cancelled or postponed prior to the event, charges will be applicable on the total invoice amount as under:
    a. More than 30 days: 5%
    b. Between 15 to 30 days: 10%
    c. Between 7 to 15 days: 25%
    d. Between 3 to 7 days: 50%
    e. Within 3 days: 100% (No refund)
12. Additional guests will be charged at full per-head rate.
13. Drivers / Staff Food will be served separately.
14. Breakage/Loss, if any, will be borne by the client.
15. All Government taxes will apply.
